atomicity.message: The staged slice is exactly land-19: D4/#16 arrow-chain sanitization for agent-facing prose and printed CLI output. It stages the README arrow rewrites, the single installCommandShim error-string rewrite, two named docs notes that are part of the land-19 payload and contain sanitized ladder examples, and the deterministic-backpressure reference ladder rewrite. Other bead-listed paths were swept but not staged because their remaining arrows are allowed symlink notation or there is no matching disallowed arrow text; unrelated docs refresh hunks remain deferred to land-21.

conditions.message: The staged land-19 slice is formatted, passes diff whitespace checks, and passes focused plus full tests relevant to shim/install/help behavior.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2442: git diff --cached --name-status and --stat matched the packet exactly: README.md, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md, docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md, and skill/burpvalve/references/deterministic-backpressure.md; 577 insertions and 17 deletions.
ScarletMarsh verified git diff --cached --check exited 0 and the staged cmd/burpvalve/main.go blob was gofmt-clean.
ScarletMarsh verified bash -n install.sh, go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Shim|Install|Help', and go test ./... exited 0.

conditions.message: The staged slice removes bare arrow-chain examples through localized prose/numbered-list rewrites and one CLI error wording change, without duplicating sanitization logic or adding parallel policy text.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached --name-status/stat matched the packet: README.md, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, two new docs, and deterministic-backpressure.md; 5 files, 577 insertions, 17 deletions.
BrightOwl verified README and deterministic-backpressure convert arrow-chain ladders to prose/numbered lists, and main.go changes only installCommandShim's error string from '->' to 'pointing to'.
BrightOwl verified git diff --cached | rg '^\\+.*-> ' produced no output.

conditions.message: The payload fixes the visible arrow-chain defect rather than exempting it, and the added docs reinforce real checks, explicit evidence, and no fake or aspirational gates.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached showed the two README arrow-chain examples were rewritten as prose and a numbered ladder, not hidden inside a different shell/prose workflow chain.

BrightOwl found guidance in docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md and docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md such as 'Do not add aspirational commands', 'never add fake commands', and 'Do not let prose policies masquerade as deterministic gates'.
BrightOwl verified the staged snapshot arrow sweep left only allowed symlink notation and fenced architecture graph hits.

ScarletMarsh message 2442 independently agreed pass, citing the main.go CLI string rewrite, README/reference ladder rewrites, no added arrow text in the staged diff, and guidance against fake deterministic claims and silent fixes.

conditions.message: The only code behavior change is the installCommandShim error message, and existing shim/install/help tests cover that command surface; added docs do not introduce functions.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached -- cmd/burpvalve/main.go showed one line changed in installCommandShim: the symlink creation failure now says 'pointing to' instead of using '->'.
BrightOwl verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Shim|Install|Help' passed in a HEAD-plus-cached-diff staged snapshot.
BrightOwl verified go test ./... passed in the staged snapshot.

conditions.message: The staged slice has matching path/stat evidence, whitespace check, arrow sweep, targeted test, shell syntax check, and full test evidence.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached --check exited 0 on the staged payload.
BrightOwl verified a staged snapshot arrow sweep returned only the allowed symlink/fenced-graph hits listed in the packet.
BrightOwl verified bash -n install.sh passed in the staged snapshot.
BrightOwl verified go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'Shim|Install|Help' and go test ./... both passed in the staged snapshot.

conditions.message: The governed surface is documentation and CLI output that should make the arrow-chain rule and future backpressure ladder easier to audit.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2442: README.md staged diff removes two fenced arrow-chain workflow examples and rewrites them as prose sentences without bare '->' workflow chains.

ScarletMarsh verified README.md and skill/burpvalve/references/deterministic-backpressure.md staged diffs replace the arrow-chain maturity ladder with numbered lists: Written/Prose rule, Attestation, Command, CI gate, Structural invariant.

ScarletMarsh found docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md adds durable notes that blocked-attempt reports should point to relevant artifacts, conditions should move from prose to executable evidence, and agents should not let prose policies masquerade as deterministic gates.
ScarletMarsh found docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md adds durable notes to run burpvalve lint and report exact evidence, and to prefer explicit evidence over silent fixes.
ScarletMarsh verified git diff --cached | rg '^\\+.*-> ' produced no output.

conditions.message: The staged payload is limited to the arrow-chain sanitization/documentation slice, and the omitted bead paths are not staged because their remaining arrows are allowed or unrelated.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly README.md, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md, docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md, and skill/burpvalve/references/deterministic-backpressure.md.

ScarletMarsh message 2442 independently agreed pass and confirmed cmd/burpvalve/main.go has only the shim error-text line staged, while the two new docs are directly relevant research/pattern notes.

conditions.message: Governed docs were inspected: the staged guidance keeps destructive or risky automation explicit, opt-in, and approval-backed; no destructive command behavior was added.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached showed no staged changes to install.sh, hook scripts, CI files, or destructive command execution paths.

BrightOwl found docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md explicitly says auto-fix should be opt-in, rerun burpvalve commit after auto-fix changes staged payload, and do not auto-install dependencies or auto-format staged files unless opted in.

BrightOwl found skill/burpvalve/references/deterministic-backpressure.md preserved guidance not to quietly add dependencies, change CI, tighten destructive-operation gates, or block new classes of work without user approval.

conditions.message: The staged payload has no governed persisted-data, migration, rollback, dedupe, backup, or audit-log storage surface.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2442: git diff --cached --name-status shows README/docs/skill-reference docs plus cmd/burpvalve/main.go only.
ScarletMarsh verified cmd/burpvalve/main.go staged diff changes only the symlink error message from 'create command shim %s -> %s' to 'create command shim %s pointing to %s'.
ScarletMarsh found no staged files touch internal/attestations, internal/backpressure artifact writing, manifest parsing, config persistence, database files, migrations, or serialized data schemas.

conditions.message: No governed security-boundary surface is changed by this staged slice under A14b: guidance that refers to security-adjacent practices influences future behavior, but influence is not carriage.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: git diff --cached changed arrow wording/docs only; no auth, secret handling, tenant isolation, permission model, scanner configuration, dependency lockfile, or hook execution code changed.
BrightOwl verified the new setup-pre-commit note discusses hook/dependency patterns only as design guidance; active hook behavior remains unstaged and unchanged.
ScarletMarsh message 2442 risk-grep diligence found security-adjacent terms only in opt-in or approval-gated documentation; no token/secret/password/credential handling was introduced.
ScarletMarsh verified cmd/burpvalve/main.go staged diff only changes an error message and does not add command execution, file writes, auth, permissions, or network behavior.

RusticDog ruling message 2445: security-boundaries is not_applicable per A14b because the staged payload contains no executable behavior, auth, secrets, permissions, hook execution, or dependency changes; documentation references to security-adjacent practices are excluded from governed status.

conditions.message: The staged docs keep agent/tool autonomy bounded by explicit confirmation, verified commands, and no silent dependency/hook/auto-fix changes.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2443: docs/setup-pre-commit-patterns.md says to detect tooling, add only real checks, ask which checks should block commits/CI, and not auto-install developer dependencies or auto-format staged files without approval.

BrightOwl found docs/matt-pocock-skill-patterns.md says not to auto-install editor-specific hooks or language dependencies without explicit user approval, and to keep command model split by inspect/mutate/verify/publish.

BrightOwl found skill/burpvalve/references/deterministic-backpressure.md retains agent guidance to inspect with JSON/config commands and apply mutations only with explicit flags or robot JSON confirm=true.
